title: TokenTelemetry — Third-Party Local Dashboard
summary: Third-party local observability dashboard for Hermes sessions/logs — costs, skills, memory, delegate_task activity. Reads Hermes session/log data; runs locally. Alternative to Hermes's bundled Langfuse plugin (v0.12+).
full_text:
Recommended by u/Extension-Aside29 in r/hermesagent post 1tixe6k. Reads Hermes session/log data; local dashboard for sessions, costs, skills, memory, delegate_task activity.

Alternative to v0.12's bundled Langfuse observability plugin (built-in).
